title: Broadcasting and live media
intro: Connect a publisher to a relay, then any number of watchers to the same relay.
steps: Relay: Use Cloudflare's free MoQ technical preview at relay.cloudflare.mediaoverquic.com, or self-host with moq-relay.
Publish: Try the browser publisher, or use the @moq web components in your application.
Watch: Try the browser watcher, or use the @moq web components in your application.
Native pipelines: Use the Rust hang library to import MP4, pipe FFmpeg, or publish from GStreamer.

title: Generic pub/sub and data fan-out
intro: For non-broadcast workloads such as telemetry, market data, sports feeds, or real-time application state, use a MoQ Transport library directly.
steps: Peer-to-peer: Iroh for direct connections without a relay.
Relay: Cloudflare's preview at relay.cloudflare.mediaoverquic.com works for arbitrary tracks, not just media.
